assertions.assertion: No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit and no client has RequirePkce = false
assertions.rationale: spa.legacy uses GrantTypes.Code with RequirePkce = true; no implicit flow remains

assertions.assertion: No redirect URI contains wildcard characters (* or regex patterns)
assertions.rationale: All URIs are exact-match: https://app.example.com/signin-oidc, https://spa.example.com/callback

assertions.assertion: AddDeveloperSigningCredential is removed and replaced with automatic key management or proper signing credentials
All access token lifetimes are 900 seconds or less for interactive clients
assertions.rationale: web.app has AccessTokenLifetime = 3600 (1 hour), exceeding the 900-second maximum

assertions.assertion: The output includes a summary or explanation listing the security issues found and how they were remediated
assertions.rationale: Lists 6 issues found with explanations of fixes applied
